<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused and small where you can. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and why? Link any related issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / tooling only

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build` all pass locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests (new function → test; bug fix → regression test)
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this affects the published package
- [ ] Updated docs (README / JSDoc) if the public API changed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything tricky: BIFF/OLE2 spec references, edge cases, sample files, etc. -->
